case_title: MITCHELL HEURING VS. FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY, LLC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY, LLC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY, LLC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $101.30) SERVED APR-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY, LLC.
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO MITCHELL HEURING-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HEURING, MITCHELL AS TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MITCHELL HEURING IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY, LLC REPRESENTED BY BRIAN FERNAU FINANCIAL SERVICE SPECIALIST. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS OUTSIDE THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS OF FOUR YEARS FROM THE ALLEGED BREACH OF WRITTEN CONTRACT OR CREDIT REPORT VIOLATION OF TWO YEARS. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
